# Brand Board Builder — Public Brand Library

Brand Board Builder (brandmd.space) is a free tool for building brand boards
and a public library of the world's iconic brands with full brand identity data.

## API Access

All brand data is available as structured JSON — no authentication required.

### List all brands
GET https://bukgitgwwmzdjibekmzb.supabase.co/functions/v1/search-brands

### Search brands
GET https://bukgitgwwmzdjibekmzb.supabase.co/functions/v1/search-brands?q={query}

### Filter by archetype
GET https://bukgitgwwmzdjibekmzb.supabase.co/functions/v1/search-brands?archetype=The+Hero

### Get single brand (full data + evolution history)
GET https://bukgitgwwmzdjibekmzb.supabase.co/functions/v1/search-brands?slug={slug}

## Data Schema

Each brand record includes:
- brand_name, slug, tagline, description, mission, vision, elevator
- industry, archetype (12 Jungian archetypes)
- primary_color, secondary_color, accent_color (hex)
- primary_font, body_font
- tone_attributes[], brand_personality[]
- photo_style, social_personality
- founded_year, country
- Year-over-year brand snapshots (brand evolution history)

## Brands in the Library

Apple, Nike, Tesla, Patagonia, Spotify, Airbnb, Netflix, Google, Coca-Cola,
Amazon, Louis Vuitton, Canva, OpenAI, Red Bull, Notion, and more.

## Build Your Own Brand Board

Free tool at https://brandmd.space — scan any website to auto-populate
your brand board with colors, fonts, and AI-generated brand identity.
